patterns.name: Document-grounded Copilot (RAG)
patterns.summary: Retrieval-augmented assistant over an agency's document corpus with citations and access trimming.

patterns.name: Real-time event summarization
patterns.summary: Stream transcription and summarization of live audio/text with structured output for downstream systems.

patterns.name: AI-assisted legacy app modernization (GitHub Copilot)
patterns.summary: Modernize legacy Microsoft Access and Oracle form-based applications to Azure using AI-assisted development with GitHub Copilot; the repeatable App-in-a-Day / App-&-AI-in-a-Day motion that moved NYC, Louisiana OTS and Florida from interest to execution.

patterns.name: Database modernization to Azure PaaS
patterns.summary: Migrate and modernize on-premises and legacy databases (incl. PostgreSQL/SQL) to Azure PaaS database services, accelerating both data and AI workloads. Core Cloud Adoption Factory migrate-&-modernize workload.

patterns.name: Constituent virtual assistant (chatbot + voice)
patterns.summary: Public chatbots, voice assistants and guidance tools that reduce call volume and improve service delivery for residents and frontline staff, grounded on agency content. Proven in the NYC AI Hackathon scalable outcomes.

patterns.name: Natural-language analytics over Microsoft Fabric
patterns.summary: Natural-language dashboards that give leadership real-time insight without business-analyst dependency, over a unified governed data estate. From the NYC Hackathon 'Instant Data Insight' outcome.
patterns.solutionPlay: Power Business Decisions with Cloud Scale Analytics

patterns.name: Operational workflow automation agents
patterns.summary: AI agents that modernize procurement, inspections, identity/access and IT workflows across agencies (e.g., NYC Buildings, Sanitation, FDNY, Health, Housing, OMB). Aligns to initial Agent Factory use cases.

accelerators.name: Azure Landing Zone (ALZ) for data platforms
